executive_summary: Added a PocketBase handler that authenticates via PocketBase REST API and translates MindsDB SQL queries into PocketBase calls.
Enables PocketBase users to query their collections through MindsDB for analytics and predictions.
Introduces a new feature with bug fixes and refactoring.
Improves documentation and environment variable support.
Introduces a test suite to verify integration with MindsDB and PocketBase.

change_units.description: Adds a PocketBase handler that authenticates via PocketBase REST API and translates MindsDB SQL queries into PocketBase calls.
change_units.inferred_intent: New feature to connect MindsDB with PocketBase for analytics and predictions.
change_units.evidence: diff shows new handler class and updated docs with PocketBase integration.

change_units.description: Fixes authentication and connection logic for the PocketBase handler.
change_units.inferred_intent: Resolves issues with PocketBase authentication and connection.
change_units.evidence: diff shows changes in authentication and connection handling.

change_units.description: Refactors the handler to support dynamic collection registration and improved error handling.
change_units.inferred_intent: Improves maintainability and robustness of the handler.
change_units.evidence: diff shows restructuring of connection logic and error handling.

change_units.description: Updates docs to reflect new functionality and changes in the PocketBase integration.
change_units.inferred_intent: Ensures clarity and correctness of documentation for new features.
change_units.evidence: diff shows added sections in docs for new features and changes.

change_units.description: Adds unit tests to verify integration with MindsDB and PocketBase.
change_units.inferred_intent: Ensures reliability of the new integration through testing.
change_units.evidence: diff shows addition of test functions and fixtures.

risks_and_concerns: Potential for authentication issues if PocketBase credentials are misconfigured.
Risk of data privacy concerns when syncing user data between MindsDB and PocketBase.
Dependency on external services (PocketBase and MindsDB) for functionality.
Need to ensure proper error handling for network issues or service downtime.
